title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Recovery Bay
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an agent trace and evaluation suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

lines.label: assumption

lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning. Artifact under review: an agent trace and evaluation suite.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Trace Events, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Trace Events record says an agent trace and evaluation suite looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve inspect the failure record.

For inspect the failure record, apply Trace Events without its stated preconditions, omit the an agent trace and evaluation suite trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Trace Events for an agent trace and evaluation suite.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair

steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Regression Analysis into observable performance evidence.
